name: Natalie
text: This is my third time at Salon Citrine and I can’t imagine going anywhere else! The studio and all of its staff are open and welcoming. I’ve loved all my experiences with Shelby, she does me right every single time!

name: Rachelle
text: I love Salon Citrine! Vibes are immaculate all throughout. Everyone is welcomed and taken care of so warmly. Miriam and Lily (and the staff I’ve interacted with but haven’t booked with) are incredibly knowledgeable and fun. This salon feels like Pure Irvington Magic and I will always go back!

name: Alyssa
text: My facial with Julie was wonderful! She is super knowledgeable about skin issues and took great care of me! The session was very relaxing, and I  was nicely hydrated afterward. Thanks Julie!

name: Sarah
text: I am new-ish to the area, and finding a stylist was one of my toughest tasks. After seeing the same person for 10+ years, trusting someone different is tough, but Jules was AMAZING. My precut consult was thorough and Jules asked great questions to help her understand my history and current goals. The cut was perfect and I have already made my next appointment. Highly recommend!

name: Kasi
text: Julie is such a knowledge powerhouse! She takes her time and really answers your questions, no matter how small. She does amazing work, I can’t wait to come back!

name: Lisa Hays
text: Shelby did a great job with my straight thin hair which grew out beautifully and allowed me more time between cuts. Thanks Shelby!

name: Hanna
text: I’ve been getting my hair cut by Lily since she opened Salon Citrine and my experience is always perfect. I truly cannot recommend her enough.

name: Rose O'Brien
text: As always my visit with Miriam was nothing short of amazing. The people are incredible and the service fantastic

name: Loretta Green
text: The two lady's that helped me we're very nice and made me feel so comfortable i definitely will be coming back and definitely would highly recommend this place

name: Matthew H.
text: Great experience! Really loved the great communication and awesome vibes :)

name: Alicia
text: Sooo sweet!! Great cut!

name: Alli Woodall
text: I had a great experience with Shelby! She took a look at the pics I brought in, understood what I was looking for from each one and made it happen! I look forward to booking a trim or a touch up with her in the future!

name: Janette
text:
Julie is amazing at her job. She has extensive knowledge of her field, so I know I can trust her recommendations. 

She put me at ease and both the treatment and the take home products have improved my skin immensely. 

My eyebrows look amazing and my skin feels great after my facial.

name: Ayanna Miller
text: Incredible as always!

name: Jill Ridge
text: My hair takes 20 minutes to cut!  Maybe 10 minutes for that luxurious hair washing! When I leave it is perfect!  Andra is my friend, and the 30 minutes I spend with Andra gives me peace and happiness for the next 3 weeks until I see her again!

name: Holden
text: Always great cut and even better atmosphere

name: Naomi
text: Andra was really attentive and did a really good job with my haircut.

name: Bill Wilkison
text: I don't get a hair cut that often, honestly once or twice a year. That's just something that happens. But the thing that excites me about it is I get to see Lily. The haircut happens, but the conversation is why I go. I always get a new music recommendation, a new story (and one I've heard before) as well thoughts on a variety of subjects at their intellectual peak. Good for your hair, your mind and ultimately your soul.

name: Barb
text: Andra always does a wonderful job on my thin fine hair.

name: Heather
text: This was my first visit, and it won't be the last!  I went in not knowing what I wanted, and Jules was friendly and had great suggestions for what I could do with my hair. The overall vibe was fun and welcoming, and I was very pleased with the haircut I received. Alllll the thumbs up!

name: Leslie
text: I saw Jules for the first time for a haircut and will definitely be returning to her! I had a certain haircut in mind and she did amazing. My hair looks great and I can’t wait to return and also recommend her to others

name: Harvey
text: Absolutely amazing. She did everything i wanted with my hair and was so polite and super funny. I dont think i’ll ever be going to a different stylist <3 not to mention the place is beautiful and the workers are so kind. Kept asking if i needed anything at all and kept me comfortable!

name: Andrea S
text: Jules did a great job fixing my hair!! I tend to go in and cut my hair randomly (not always the best idea) but Jules was able to fix it up so I don’t look all crazy. They are very easy to talk to and know what they are doing. Definitely coming back!

name: Tara
text: Shelby gave me the exact cut and salon experience I was looking for! I'm simply thrilled! 100/10 highly recommend ♥️

name: Heather Daniels
text: We had the best experience with Jules. My daughter had her very first salon experience and said it was nothing less than magical. The care and attention to detail from Jules is something to be seen. Not every day you meet someone who truly enjoys what they’re doing. It was the perfect introduction to style for my daughter, who vows to never go anywhere else.

name: Sara
text: Lily and Miriam are INCREDIBLE! They’re kind, warm, fun and make everyone feel welcome and cared for. They are beyond skilled at their work and my daughter and I always leave so happy with our hair cuts. Customers for life for sure.

name: James Heil
text: Super friendly and sweet, immediately caught the things I wanted to change before I could even notice haha. A great stylist!

name: Brian C.
text: Lily and the staff at Salon Citrine are absolutely wonderful. They’re friendly, accepting, and always go the extra mile to ensure that you’re happy with the choices and direction of the haircut.  I can’t recommend them enough, and was so happy that Lily and company were able to start this shop a few years back.  Plus, the salon is in a great neighborhood with fantastic restaurants and shops nearby!  I can’t recommend it enough.

name: Janet Branch
text: Julie is very attentive and friendly and works quickly which is much appreciated when having hair removal done. She introduced me to purple wax and is always researching new products to help your experience be as comfortable as possible.

name: Logan hensley
text: Super friendly and accommodating to my requests and I really love the way my hair turned out :3

name: Angelina
text: Julie was very sweet and welcoming as soon as I walked in. It was a very relaxing experience, and I left with super hydrated and glowy skin. I’ll definitely be booking again! :)

name: Shannon
text: Andra was wonderful! I really loved my haircut. This was my first time at the salon, and Andra was really welcoming! I will definitely be back! :D

name: Jenny
text: Shelby's great! I know she specializes in more complicated styling, but I over the moon with my super normal haircut. :)

name: Kate Marshall
text: I loved my time at Salon Citrine! Lily was amazing. She listened to me and had solid suggestions for what I could do to help my hair be the way I wanted it to be. I am really looking forward to coming back. This place is awesome. So welcoming and so lovely.

name: Ilene
text: Charming salon and Lily was so friendly and great at cutting my hair. This was my first visit but I will return.

name: Amy
text: What can I say Andra is totally awesome!  She came recommended by some friends and my only regret is not listening to them sooner. Fabulous experience every time. Thank you!

name: Jolene Mentink Moffatt
text: Julie is a dream!  Kind and thoughtful and listens and responds to your concerns and goals. I feel transported, even when the shop is bustling just outside the curtain, her little space still feels intimate and private. Highly recommend!

name: Kelly
text: I absolutely love Lily and Miriam and have never had a bad cut. The salon is so welcoming and cozy.

name: Jena
text: Lily is so personable and funny and is a genius with her tools. I love the whole vibe of the salon and they take care of you with snacks, drinks, blankies, and more from start to finish! I always recommend them when I can. Thanks for being awesome, Lily and team!

name: Monica
text: Great experience, great vibe!

name: Rose O'Brien
text: I have been coming here for about a year and a half and these wonderful people have seen me through so much. They have kept me looking beautiful through all of the stages of my transition, and I cannot thank them enough.

name: Shannon Kuhn
text: Andra and the entire Salon Citrine team are the most welcoming business in Indianapolis. Andra has been doing my hair for almost 5 years now and I couldn't think about going to anyone else. Thank you Andra for always making me look like a nice lady :)

name: Mary Grimmer
text: Julie is amazing! Explains everything and what to do for after care. So professional and kind.

name: Amy Shaff
text: Always the best experience at salon citrine! Andra always leads by listening and I trust her completely with my hair! Everyone goes above and beyond to make the experience complete- from the head massage, to the wine, and the conversation, I couldn’t be happier to have found the best salon in the city!

name: Elise Hertz
text: Julie is just the best and my brows look great.

name: Julia
text: Lily was so friendly, the scalp massage was awesome and my haircut was a big chop and exactly what I wanted. I’m so glad Salon Citrine is in my neighborhood!

name: Star S.
text: Andra has been my stylist for over 6 years! She's found the perfect custom dye formula that takes my hair from vibrant purple to a lovely periwinkle between haircuts. I always feel fantastic afterwards and get so many compliments. I appreciate Andra's phenomenal work!

name: Denise
text:
I love sitting in Miriam’s chair! She ALWAYS does  an amazing job, and is ALWAYS game for my ever changing ideas!
Salon Citrine is THE best treat yo’self!

name: Riss
text:
Since day one, Salon Citrine has consistently been a welcoming, supportive, vibrant space. Every stylist listens to the wants of their clients and everyone leaves happy. 

And more specifically, I fully enjoy my stylist, Lily. Her passion for hair, for trying new things, and her boundless energy is uplifting and a full joy. I enjoy listening to her stories while my hair is getting done, and leave loving my hair each time. 100/10 recommend

name: Erin
text: Miriam was great, listened to what I wanted and executed very well, and went above and beyond to make the experience as enjoyable as possible!

name: Betsy Totty
text: Lily is the best! My curly/waves are always amazing and my color is perfect every single time! Love, love, love Salon Citrine🧡

name: Dan
text: Miriam is professional, kind, and thoughtful. The salon is so welcoming and comfortable.

name: Ray
text: Likely did a great job with my hair. She was very welcoming and very intuitive. 10/10 would recommend!

name: Jane H
text: Julie is truly amazing. Her facials are wonderful and she is such a great person, too. Highly recommend!

name: Anna Griffin
text: Nice visit, great haircut.

name: Shelley
text: Andra is fantastic.  She's been my stylist since for ten years-- when I lived in Bloomington for three of those, I drove up to Indy for appointments with her.  I love the way she weaves the color in my hair so that it looks natural.  I regularly receive compliments about my haircut.

name: Mandy
text: Salon Citrine is everything I didn’t know I needed in a hair salon! Amazing humans, inviting and very comfortable atmosphere, and incredible hair coloring and styling! Andra showed the perfect blend of listening to what I wanted to keep or change about my hair, and offering her expert suggestions on what else might complement my desired look (and she was right!). 10/10 recommend!

name: Kristen
text: Shelby is the best! Sweetest person and an amazing stylist. My hairstyle isn't simple, and she knows what to do to make it perfect every time. And the salon has the best atmosphere I've ever experienced. Highly recommend.

name: Baili
text: Absolutely phenomenal job, my hair is perfect! Color, cut and style she did amazing!

name: Eliza
text: SUCH a comfortable and vibey place. Everyone was so so nice and the work done not just on me bit on all of the other clients was phenomenal. Miriam is very communicative throughout the whole process and always wanted to make sure I felt comfortable and good. There's not only free tea and coffee but fidgets and other sensory items offered that I've never seen provided anywhere else. Truly an amazing salon and amazing stylist :D

name: Amy Weaver
text: Absolutely amazing per usual!  Love the great conversations- added bonus to a great haircut!

name: Jay
text: As always an excellent cut and a pleasant moment in my day.

name: Elise Hertz
text: Julie always does a fantastic job on my brows and this space is so warm & welcoming.  Highly recommend.

name: Mary Fritz
text: Julie is extremely knowledgeable about every skin type and concern. She has gone above and beyond to accommodate my allergies and sensitivities to ensure I have the safest and best experience.  The one hour I spend in her soothing cocoon of care and relaxation is the best hour I spend all month.  A bonus is the inclusivity to all in the community.

name: Barbara
text: I was a client of Andra's at another salon.  When she opened this salon, I came with her!  Love how she does my hair!!

name: Regina Bergen
text: Great people doing great work! Relaxing, caring and talented people!

name: Deb Shaver
text: Lily is the best!  She has done wonders with my hair and she’s a lovely person - total win/win.

name: Jill Ridge
text: Andra is my friend, my coach, my hair cutter and my inspiration !  Hair cut day is my happy day!

name: Molly
text: The salon is so welcoming and inviting- they are all so sweet and considerate! If you are the type of person who is anxious about having your hair done, this is the place to go! Very kind and accommodating.

name: Amy Weaver
text: Andra is amazing, professional and easy to talk to!  She actively listens and provides recommendations to ensure client satisfaction. Everyone is respectful and so kind . Excellent environment- clean, organized and fun!

name: Amanda V
text: I love love love Shelby! I saw her today (9/27) and I my hair looks freaking AMAZING! I walked out feeling sexy, strong, and like my old (not in age) self again. I am so glad my husband and I found this salon. We love it here! Thank you for making us feel welcome and comfortable. 10 outta 10!

name: Amanda V
text: Shelby is amazing! She listened to my ideas and just made me feel comfortable and like I belong there. She took my awkwardness very well! 😄

name: Mary Ann Pennington
text: I know my hair will always look great after my appointment with Lily.

name: René Kocurek
text: Shelby was such a sweetheart! We chatted the whole time (we had a lot in common!) and she did such a great job listening and clarifying exactly what I wanted. She double checked my opinion on just the right amount of things and truly customized my experience. I've already booked her again for my tween. 👍

name: Jennifer
text: Julie always listens and makes me feel comfortable. She really takes time to work on a plan that works for me and my budget.

name: Jennifer
text: Julie was honest about what she was able to accomplish with the thin brows I had and gifted me brow serum to help with making them thicker.

name: Diamond Ramey
text: Lily is GREAT with my girls! Treats them like they are her besties!

name: Kelby
text: Thoughtful and patient. My haircut was completed with professional moxie all while holding a conversation like I was talking to an old friend. We are fortunate that they have chosen to invest their talents here in Irvington.

name: Nancy davis
text: Best haircut and great atmosphere!!! Highly recommend!!!!

name: Betsy Totty
text:
Aside from being an OUTSTANDING human, Lily is skilled and knowledgeable in every area of hair that I need (cut for curly/wavy hair, color, aging gracefully).

I have followed her for over ten years because she understands my curl pattern and gets my style. She will listen to you and consider your lifestyle. 

Salon Citrine is a loving and welcoming salon that serves ALL people. I love my visits there and look forward to them!

name: kaley
text: Shelby is lovely. An artiste! she does some magical hair painting

name: Tracy Morrison
text: My hair looks and feels awesome. She did a great job. Love the salon’s look and atmosphere

name: Brenda Jackson
text:
Friendly, lovely people who really know what they’re doing!  This salon is for all ages and walks of life. A mini- vacation in a beautiful setting. 
5 stars for Lily!

name: Jenny Ibey
text: Lily is so wonderful! She was so patient & kind to my 2 year old son during his hair cut. Lily always has the best energy to be around! Deserves 10 stars but it only allows 5!

name: Holli Frazell
text: Andra always does a phenomenal job on my hair. I get compliments on my color every time I come to see her!

name: Jill Ridge
text: It’s HAIR day!  Andra listens, takes requests, makes suggestions and carries on with decisions!  I always leave smiling!  And that hair wash…..I go to many places during that hair wash/head massage!  Andra is exceptional!

name: Meghan Benczik
text: Wonderful experience as always! Professional service, welcoming environment, and everyone is very caring!

name: Sue Pope
text: Andra was a true professional.  She listened to what I wanted and she explained everything about the gray blending and my cut. She was so personable and reassuring.  I am thrilled with the result.   Thank you Andra!
